name: dangtran1003/docsmith-v2
description: Re-run safe documentation skill: standalone workspace + deploy to host project (Docusaurus). Includes update/overwrite/side-by-side gate, KB inheritance for content updates, walkthrough drift detection (verify → gate → apply → capture), product-bug tracking across runs, delete propagation. Audience analysis, planning, UX content standards, drafting, walkthrough verification, tutorial video recording, locale-aware folder structure, deploy with frontmatter injection and image namespacing.
